dependencyDashboardHeader: Renovate is configured to list discovered dependency updates here first. Do not approve dashboard items until the update scope has been reviewed.

packageRules.description: Treat Renovate as the declaration upgrade mechanism; repo update/pin tasks own resolved lockfile changes.
Do not propose runtime, package-manager, or Bazel toolchain upgrades in the dashboard baseline.
Do not propose Bazel registry module upgrades for build rules/tooling in the dashboard baseline.
Do not track Docker image references in this repository.
Do not propose routine Grid UI dependency upgrades in the dashboard baseline; keep vulnerability fixes eligible.
Group Bazel and Bazel module dependency declarations in the dashboard.
Use Maven version ordering for Maven artifacts found through Bazel managers.
Group GitHub Actions workflow dependencies in the dashboard.
Group JavaScript package declarations in the dashboard.
Group Python declarations and pinned requirements in the dashboard.
Group Ruby declarations and runtime version files in the dashboard.
Group Rust Cargo declarations in the dashboard.
Group .NET package declarations and tools in the dashboard.
